description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard with a rich reddish-brown finish. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, giving the rifle a robust and utilitarian appearance. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, typically associated with the AK-47 family, and is finished in black. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights, with the front post and rear notch clearly visible. The muzzle end of the barrel features a slotted flash hider, a common feature for this rifle type. The overall design is iconic, blending wood and metal elements for both durability and classic aesthetics.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, curved black magazine, and matte metal receiver and barrel, featuring standard iron sights and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, iron sights alignment, and the width of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, trigger, magazine, and the wooden components in detail.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the magazine curvature, trigger guard, and the underside of the stock and barrel.
